languages.text: {n}Из вокс-решетки вырывается резкий неприятный звук, от которого закладывает уши.{/n} "Вижу, аколиты Диодаса работают не покладая рук! Языков, в их случае. Надеюсь, вы никому не повторяли этот абсурдный слух? Если до моих вассалов дойдут лживые новости о моей гибели, мы можем никогда не дождаться подкрепления!"

{n}A harsh, unpleasant sound bursts from the vox-grille, briefly deafening you.{/n} "I see the acolytes of Diodas are hard at work! Wagging their tongues, in this case. I hope you have not repeated this absurd rumour to anyone? If false news of my demise reaches my vassals, we may never see any reinforcements!"
languages.original_text: {n}Из вокс-решетки вырывается резкий неприятный звук, от которого закладывает уши.{/n} "Вижу, аколиты Диодаса работают не покладая рук! Языков, в их случае. Надеюсь, вы никому не повторяли этот абсурдный слух? Если до моих вассалов дойдут лживые новости о моей гибели, мы можем никогда не дождаться подкрепления!"

I hope you have not repeated this absurd rumour to anyone? If false news of my demise reaches my vassals, we may never see any reinforcements!"

{n}A harsh, unpleasant sound bursts from the vox-grille, briefly deafening you.{/n} "I see the acolytes of Diodas are hard at work! Wagging their tongues, in this case. I hope you have not repeated this absurd rumour to anyone? If false news of my demise reaches my vassals, we may never see any reinforcements!"

languages.text: {n}音阵格栅里爆发出一阵刺耳难听的噪音，险些让你失聪。{/n}“看来狄奥达斯的侍仆们真是没闲着啊！竟然忙着到处嚼舌头。但愿你没把这荒唐的谣言传出去。若是我不在人世的谣言传到我的封臣那里，援军恐怕永远都不会到了！”
languages.original_text: {n}A harsh, unpleasant sound bursts from the vox-grille, briefly deafening you.{/n} "I see the acolytes of Diodas are hard at work! Wagging their tongues, in this case. I hope you have not repeated this absurd rumour to anyone? If false news of my demise reaches my vassals, we may never see any reinforcements!"

traits.locale_text: {n}音阵格栅里爆发出一阵刺耳难听的噪音，险些让你失聪。{/n}“看来狄奥达斯的侍仆们真是没闲着啊！竟然忙着到处嚼舌头。但愿你没把这荒唐的谣言传出去。若是我不在人世的谣言传到我的封臣那里，援军恐怕永远都不会到了！”

languages.text: {n}Une atroce cacophonie jaillit subitement de la grille-vox et vous assourdit quelques instants.{/n} « Je constate que les sbires de Diodas n'ont pas chômé ! Après tout, ils ne sont pas à un mensonge près. J'ose espérer que vous n'avez pas colporté cette rumeur absurde sur tous les toits ? Si ma mort présumée parvenait jusqu'aux oreilles de mes vassaux, nous pourrions faire une croix sur les renforts attendus ! »
languages.original_text: {n}A harsh, unpleasant sound bursts from the vox-grille, briefly deafening you.{/n} "I see the acolytes of Diodas are hard at work! Wagging their tongues, in this case. I hope you have not repeated this absurd rumour to anyone? If false news of my demise reaches my vassals, we may never see any reinforcements!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Une atroce cacophonie jaillit subitement de la grille-vox et vous assourdit quelques instants.{/n} « Je constate que les sbires de Diodas n'ont pas chômé ! Après tout, ils ne sont pas à un mensonge près. J'ose espérer que vous n'avez pas colporté cette rumeur absurde sur tous les toits ? Si ma mort présumée parvenait jusqu'aux oreilles de mes vassaux, nous pourrions faire une croix sur les renforts attendus ! »

languages.text: {n}Voks ızgarasından sert, nahoş bir ses patlıyor ve seni kısa süreliğine de olsa sağır ediyor.{/n} "Gördüğüm kadarıyla Diodas'ın havarileri yine iş başında! Çenelerini bir türlü tutamıyorlar. Umarım bu zırvalıktan kimseye bahsetmemişsindir. Ölümümle ilgili yanlış haberler vasallarıma ulaşırsa bir daha asla takviye alamayız!"
languages.original_text: {n}A harsh, unpleasant sound bursts from the vox-grille, briefly deafening you.{/n} "I see the acolytes of Diodas are hard at work! Wagging their tongues, in this case. I hope you have not repeated this absurd rumour to anyone? If false news of my demise reaches my vassals, we may never see any reinforcements!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Voks ızgarasından sert, nahoş bir ses patlıyor ve seni kısa süreliğine de olsa sağır ediyor.{/n} "Gördüğüm kadarıyla Diodas'ın havarileri yine iş başında! Çenelerini bir türlü tutamıyorlar. Umarım bu zırvalıktan kimseye bahsetmemişsindir. Ölümümle ilgili yanlış haberler vasallarıma ulaşırsa bir daha asla takviye alamayız!"

languages.text: {n}Un sonido áspero y desagradable estalla desde la rejilla de voco, ensordeciéndote por un momento.{/n} «¡Veo que los acólitos de Diodas no descansan! En este caso, mienten. Espero que no le haya contado este absurdo rumor a nadie. Si mis vasallos reciben falsas noticias sobre mi defunción, ¡dudo que lleguemos a ver los refuerzos!».
languages.original_text: {n}A harsh, unpleasant sound bursts from the vox-grille, briefly deafening you.{/n} "I see the acolytes of Diodas are hard at work! Wagging their tongues, in this case. I hope you have not repeated this absurd rumour to anyone? If false news of my demise reaches my vassals, we may never see any reinforcements!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Un sonido áspero y desagradable estalla desde la rejilla de voco, ensordeciéndote por un momento.{/n} «¡Veo que los acólitos de Diodas no descansan! En este caso, mienten. Espero que no le haya contado este absurdo rumor a nadie. Si mis vasallos reciben falsas noticias sobre mi defunción, ¡dudo que lleguemos a ver los refuerzos!».

languages.text: {n}Ein harsches, unangenehmes Geräusch aus dem Vox-Gitter raubt dir kurz das Gehör. {/n} "Wie ich sehe, sind Diodas' Akolythen emsig am Werk! Und wetzen ihre Zungen, wie es scheint. Ich hoffe, Ihr habt dieses absurde Gerücht nicht weitergetragen? Sollten falsche Nachrichten hinsichtlich meines Ablebens meine Vasallen erreichen, werden wir nie Verstärkung erhalten!"
languages.original_text: {n}A harsh, unpleasant sound bursts from the vox-grille, briefly deafening you.{/n} "I see the acolytes of Diodas are hard at work! Wagging their tongues, in this case. I hope you have not repeated this absurd rumour to anyone? If false news of my demise reaches my vassals, we may never see any reinforcements!"

Und wetzen ihre Zungen, wie es scheint. Ich hoffe, Ihr habt dieses absurde Gerücht nicht weitergetragen? Sollten falsche Nachrichten hinsichtlich meines Ablebens meine Vasallen erreichen, werden wir nie Verstärkung erhalten!"

languages.text: {n}ディオダスの信者たちは、この騒動を耳にして、大慌てで駆けつけた。{/n}「ディオダスの信者たちは、大忙しですね。舌を振る、という表現が適切ですね。この馬鹿げた噂を、誰かに伝えていないことを願っています。私の死の偽情報が、私の従者たちに届けば、我々は決して援軍を迎えられません！」
languages.original_text: {n}A harsh, unpleasant sound bursts from the vox-grille, briefly deafening you.{/n} "I see the acolytes of Diodas are hard at work! Wagging their tongues, in this case. I hope you have not repeated this absurd rumour to anyone? If false news of my demise reaches my vassals, we may never see any reinforcements!"

traits.locale_text: {n}ディオダスの信者たちは、この騒動を耳にして、大慌てで駆けつけた。{/n}「ディオダスの信者たちは、大忙しですね。舌を振る、という表現が適切ですね。この馬鹿げた噂を、誰かに伝えていないことを願っています。私の死の偽情報が、私の従者たちに届けば、我々は決して援軍を迎えられません！」
